title: Identical expressions should not be used on both sides of a binary operator
description: This rule identifies the usage of identical expressions on both sides of a binary operator.
message: Identical expressions found on both sides of binary operator
recommendation: Use different expressions on both sides of binary operators

noncompliant.description: Non-compliant code showing identical expressions on both sides of binary operator

compliant.description: Compliant code showing different expressions on both sides of binary operator

why_is_this_an_issue: Using identical expressions on both sides of a binary operator can lead to confusion and errors, making the code harder to maintain and understand.
how_to_fix: Replace identical expressions with different ones on both sides of binary operators.

metadata.title: Identical expressions should not be used on both sides of a binary operator
